Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC051 "CUTHBERTINTHEJUNGLE-1000-C051" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cuthbert in the Jungle (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $1000 which sets the first two bytes of the temporary area at $22 to $40, $08. This allows the game to start in the expected state.
